samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Divide the input frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">The input clock signal</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">Reset signal</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_50">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2, to 0 when RST is active.</description>
            <condition>
                <input_ref id="RST"/>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <output_ref id="CLK_50"/> = 0;
            </assignment>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_10">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10, to 0, and the counter cnt_10 is reset to 0, when RST is active.</description>
            <condition>
                <input_ref id="RST"/>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = 0;
                <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = 0;
            </assignment>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_1">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100, to 0, and the counter cnt_100 is reset to 0, when RST is active.</description>
            <condition>
                <input_ref id="RST"/>
            </condition>
            <assignment>
                <output_ref id="CLK_1"/> = 0;
                <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = 0;
            </assignment>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <description>Divide the input clock frequency.</description>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_in"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_50"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_50"/>;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_in"/>
        <input_ref id="RST"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_10"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_in"/>
        <input_ref id="RST"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_1"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_1"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_50"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_50"/>;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <input_ref id="RST"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_10"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_10"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> + 1;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <input_ref id="RST"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_1"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_1"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <input_ref id="cnt_10"/> == 4
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_10"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <negation>
            <input_ref id="cnt_10"/> == 4
        </negation>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> = <output_ref id="cnt_10"/> + 1;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <input_ref id="RST"/>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_1"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_1"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <negation>
            <input_ref id="cnt_100"/> == 49
        </negation>
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_10"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_10"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> + 1;
    </assignment>
    <condition>
        <input_ref id="CLK_10"/>
        <input_ref id="cnt_100"/> == 49
    </condition>
    <assignment>
        <output_ref id="CLK_1"/> = ~<output_ref id="CLK_1"/>; <output_ref id="cnt_100"/> = 0;
    </assignment>
    </implementation>
</module>
